note: Unified job-free DCL sentinel profile. It composes the live-proven physical, magic, Instant-KO, status-carrier, status-producer, one-turn Taunt fallback, atomic HP/MP, managed-multistrike, and synthetic/native Reaction mechanisms. Every special value is a bounded technical fixture rather than final balance policy. The profile requires its paired neutralized action-data artifact and must not be deployed as the final mod.

resolutions.DclDamageFormula: if(t.charId == 31 && dcl.nativeMpDebitResult && dcl.oldDebit == 0 && dcl.oldMpDebit > 1, max(1, dcl.oldMpDebit - min(t.mp, max(1, dcl.oldMpDebit / 2))), if(action.abilityId == 101, ability.dcl.power * dcl.strike.normalHitCount + mulDiv(ability.dcl.power, 3, 2) * dcl.strike.criticalCount, if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, if(dcl.magicAbsorbed || dcl.targetNull, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0), if(action.type == 1 && action.abilityId == 0, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.weaponModel, 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.magicAmount, 0), if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.oldDebit, 0))))))
resolutions.DclHealingFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage && dcl.magicAbsorbed, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.magicAmount, 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, if(t.status.undead, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0), if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.oldCredit, 0)))

patch.DclPreviewDamageFormula: if(action.abilityId == 101, ability.dcl.power * ability.dcl.strike_count, if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.magicAbsorbed || dcl.targetNull, 0, dcl.magicAmount), if(action.type == 1 && action.abilityId == 0, dcl.weaponModel, if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, dcl.magicAmount, 0))))
patch.DclAttackSkillFormula: if(action.abilityId == 101, 12 - dcl.strike.index, dcl.weaponSkill + dcl.zodiacHitModifier + dcl.pointBlank * const.dclPointBlankSkillModifier)
